steps.t: Gêna has asked you to go to the Usâl and fill four bags with soil from the dried river-bed.
Gêna has asked you to go to the Usâl and fill four sacks with soil from the dried river-bed. You have collected the soil and should bring it to Gêna i…
You have collected the sediment Gêna asked for and delivered it to her. She will put it in the planter with the seeds while you get a bucket of water …
The planter has been filled with soil, seeded, and watered. You should talk to Gêna.
